text:
<commit_analysis>
- Changed files: `frontend/src/pages/RelaySwap.tsx`, `frontend/src/pages/Index.tsx`, deleted `frontend/src/pages/RelaySwap.tsx.backup`, updated build output
- Nature: cleanup + feature additions across multiple sessions — batch display fix, API key integration, deep token security scanning with structured UI panels, dead code removal
- Changes include: Farcaster mini app frame layout fixes, Moralis/Alchemy API keys wired in, expanded TokenRisk interface with taxes/holders/liquidity/contract age, 6-step security scanner (heuristics + Moralis + GoPlus + honeypot.is + address security + contract age), structured security panels in batch tab and swap tab From section, removed ~250 lines of dead code (unused state, functions, imports, backup file)
</commit_analysis>
